attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.ITEM_TYPE, STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.ITEM_KEY, STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.PROCESS_ACTIVITY, STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.ACTIVITY_STATUS, STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.ACTIVITY_RESULT_CODE, STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.ASSIGNED_USER, STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.NOTIFICATION_ID, STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.BEGIN_DATE, STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.END_DATE, STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.EXECUTION_TIME, STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.ERROR_NAME, STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.ERROR_MESSAGE, STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.ERROR_STACK, STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.OUTBOUND_QUEUE_ID, STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.DUE_DATE, STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.SECURITY_GROUP_ID, STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.ACTION, STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.PERFORMED_BY, STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES,
(
select ITEM_TYPE ,ITEM_KEY ,PROCESS_ACTIVITY,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES
minus
select ITEM_TYPE ,ITEM_KEY ,PROCESS_ACTIVITY,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES
) ACM
where 
 ACM.ITEM_TYPE = STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.ITEM_TYPE and 
 ACM.ITEM_KEY = STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.ITEM_KEY and 
 ACM.PROCESS_ACTIVITY = STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.PROCESS_ACTIVITY and 
ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES)
